data.title: Amtelco launches Ellie™, an AI-powered virtual agent platform, using LLM & NLP, to handle caller interactions & reduce wait times.
data.description: Amtelco, a company based in McFarland, Wisconsin, has introduced a new intelligent virtual agent platform called Ellie™. This AI-powered platform is designed to manage caller interactions using a large language model and natural language processing. Ellie is equipped to assist live agents during high call volumes by automating processes and effectively handling existing call scripts. By leveraging AI technology, Ellie aims to minimize caller wait times and enhance overall call center efficiency.

data.title: NiSource Foundation hosts 'Introduce a Girl to STEAM' event across five states, 300 girls explore STEAM careers.
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, the NiSource Charitable Foundation, along with NiSource operating companies Columbia Gas and NIPSCO, recently organized the second edition of the ‘Introduce a Girl to STEAM Signature Event.’ This event welcomed over 300 young girls from schools to delve into career opportunities in Science, Technology, Engineering, Art, and Mathematics (STEAM). The initiative reflects the Foundation’s goal to foster robust and enduring communities where NiSource employees and customers reside.

data.title: Coeur CEO to present at BMO conference on Feb 24 at 7am CT. Event for investors; reserves now.
data.description: The Chairman, President, and CEO of Coeur Mining, Inc. (NYSE: CDE), Mitchell J. Krebs, is scheduled to speak at the BMO Capital Markets Global Metals, Mining & Critical Minerals Conference in Hollywood, Florida, on February 24, 2026. The presentation will take place at 7:00 a.m. Central Time (8:00 a.m. Eastern Time). This conference is exclusive and invitation-only, focusing on investments in the metals, mining, and critical minerals sectors. Presentation materials will be provided during the event.

data.title: Myriad Genetics to announce Q4 and FY 2025 financial results on Feb 23, 2026, with earnings call at 4:30 pm ET.
data.description: Myriad is set to conduct its Q4 and full year 2025 earnings conference call at 4:30 pm ET on Monday, February 23, 2026.

data.title: Curaleaf changes date for special meeting to seek shareholder approval, previously scheduled for Feb. 20, 2026.
data.description: On February 16th, 2026, Curaleaf Holdings, Inc. (TSX: CURA) (OTCQX: CURLF) based in Stamford, Connecticut, a prominent global supplier of cannabis consumer goods, disclosed a rescheduling of its special meeting. The meeting was initially planned to pursue certain objectives but has been postponed to a later date.

data.title: Graphic Packaging Holding Company to present at Raymond James Institutional Investors Conference on March 2. CEO Robbert Rietbroek will represent the global leader in sustainable consumer packaging.
data.description: On February 16, 2026, Graphic Packaging Holding Company (NYSE: GPK) disclosed that Robbert Rietbroek, the President and CEO, is set to speak at the Raymond James Institutional event. Graphic Packaging is renowned for its sustainable consumer packaging globally.
